seo.title: Product Infographics – Explain Features Visually | OpenCreator
seo.description: Turn complex product features into clear, high-converting infographics with AI—comparison charts, feature callouts, icons, and diagrams. Perfect infographic maker for Amazon A+ content.

hero.title: Product Infographics
hero.description: Turn complex product features and benefits into clear infographics without a designer. Create comparison charts, feature callouts, icons, and diagrams.
hero.inputPlaceholder: List your product features, specs, and key benefits

steps.title: Provide product details and value proposition
steps.description: Paste features, specifications, comparisons, and top benefits.

steps.title: Choose infographic layout and style
steps.description: Select grids, before/after, comparison tables, or benefit diagrams.

steps.title: Generate branded product infographics
steps.description: AI designs visuals with icons, labels, and hierarchy in your brand style.

steps.title: Export for PDPs, decks, and ads
steps.description: Download high-resolution infographics for product pages, pitch decks, and ads.

whoIsFor.title: For teams that need to explain products clearly
whoIsFor.subtitle: From e-commerce to SaaS, see who uses AI product infographics.

audiences.label: E-commerce product teams
audiences.description: Help shoppers grasp specs and differentiators instantly on PDPs.

audiences.label: SaaS and software marketers
audiences.description: Visualize workflows and feature sets anyone can grasp.

audiences.label: B2B sales and presales teams
audiences.description: Create explainer visuals for proposals and demos without design wait time.

audiences.label: Agencies and studios
audiences.description: Produce infographics at scale for many clients.

items.question: What is the Product Infographics workflow?
items.answer: An AI workflow that turns product details into branded, conversion-focused infographics.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: E-commerce product teams, SaaS marketers, B2B sales, and agencies.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: Provide features, specs, comparisons, and benefits in text form.

items.question: What outputs will I get?
items.answer: High-resolution infographic images for PDPs, decks, and ads.

items.question: Can I pick layouts and brand styles?
items.answer: Yes. Choose layouts and AI will apply your brand colors and typography.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Generations consume credits by resolution and scope. Iterate within your plan.

webPage.name: Product Infographics – Explain Features Visually
webPage.description: AI-generated product infographics for marketing and sales.

softwareApplication.name: Product Infographics Template
softwareApplication.description: AI workflow that creates product infographics from text inputs.
